_note: Labels written by Claude (vision-enabled) as a consistent grader for the eval set. NOT professional portraitist ground truth — Claude is applying portrait-photography heuristics (Hurley/Bryce/Adler vocabulary, classical lighting patterns, headroom + eyeline rules) consistently across all 12 photos. The point is consistency + traceability: every delta has a one-line reason so a human reviewer can disagree with specific items, not just the abstract result. Replace per-photo deltas when a real photographer reviews. Scale: -10..10 per category (-5..5 for headpose). 0 = matches the baseline (avg portrait at the synthesizer's default score). Positive = noticeably better than baseline; negative = noticeable problem.

sample1.jpg.note: NASA studio portrait of Kalpana Chawla in orange flight suit. US flag intrudes from left edge. Flat agency studio lighting. Direct warm smile. Mottled gray backdrop.

lighting.reason: Competent studio key but flat — no modeling, no flattering shape on face.

composition.reason: Three-quarter framing acceptable; head close to top edge but not clipped.

background.reason: Two competing elements: cropped flag on left + mottled studio backdrop; subject doesn't pop.

eyecontact.reason: Direct warm smile with engaged eyes; natural agency-portrait confidence.

headpose.reason: Subtle right turn, slight chin-tuck — approachable.

sample2.jpg.note: Tight headshot of smiling man on grey marble wall. Soft directional light with clear catchlights. Top of head clipped (intentional headshot crop). Warm natural skin.

lighting.reason: Soft directional key, strong catchlights, natural skin texture — top-quality natural-light portrait.

composition.reason: Eyes on upper third; tight crop is the correct casting-headshot pattern even with hair clipped.

background.reason: Mottled marble blurred enough not to compete; neutral and works with subject.

eyecontact.reason: Direct, warm, friendly; catchlights make eyes pop.

sample3.jpg.note: Young woman with hair bun and freckles on solid pink background. Even soft beauty light. Direct neutral expression, slightly parted lips. Natural makeup.

lighting.reason: Even soft beauty light with catchlights; slight shadow under jaw but flattering overall.

composition.reason: Tight crop, eyes upper third, bun creates pleasing shape at top of frame.

background.reason: Solid clean pink complements skin/hair — strong styling choice that doesn't compete.

eyecontact.reason: Direct engaging gaze; neutral expression rather than warm smile — confident but cooler.

headpose.reason: Frontal, neutral — pleasant but unremarkable pose.

sample4.jpg.note: Brooding man in grey knit shawl-collar sweater on black backdrop. Stylized moody low-key lighting with one shadowed eye. Intense neutral expression.

lighting.reason: Intentional moody low-key style; one eye partly in shadow is genre-appropriate, not a flaw.

composition.reason: Tight headshot, ideal headroom, head centered; sweater texture adds interest below.

background.reason: Pure black, subject pops crisply; absolute clean separation.

eyecontact.reason: Direct piercing gaze, neutral — works for the editorial vibe even without smile.

headpose.reason: Frontal with slight downward look that adds gravity.

sample5.jpg.note: Golden-hour outdoor portrait, woman in striped shirt. Warm rim/side light. Dark out-of-focus landscape background. Half-length, slight 3/4 pose.

lighting.reason: Beautiful golden-hour direction; flattering warm rim with romantic modeling on face.

composition.reason: Well-placed, eyes upper third, hair frames jawline, half-length crop is strong.

background.reason: Heavy bokeh dark landscape — could be brighter but separation is generous.

eyecontact.reason: Direct, slight closed-lip smile, strong catchlights — very engaging.

headpose.reason: Subtle 3/4 angle, natural; slight chin-tuck adds intimacy.

sample6.jpg.note: B&W heavy-bearded man on plain medium-grey backdrop. Soft even studio light. Warm smile through beard.

lighting.reason: Soft even studio light; flat in B&W but exposure is clean and skin reads natural.

composition.reason: Tight headshot, eyes upper third, head fills frame well.

background.reason: Plain grey gradient — clean, doesn't compete.

eyecontact.reason: Direct, warm smile through beard, engaging eyes.

headpose.reason: Frontal with very slight tilt — natural.

sample7.jpg.note: Young Asian man on plain grey. Subject heavily off-center to right with empty negative space on left. Direct neutral expression, no smile.

lighting.reason: Soft directional from upper-right, lights nose and forehead; flat-ish but clean.

composition.reason: Subject too far right with awkward dead space on left; not deliberate lead room since subject looks straight at camera.

background.reason: Plain grey is clean but the empty half highlights the framing problem rather than separates subject.

eyecontact.reason: Direct gaze but neutral/disengaged expression — not unfriendly, not warm.

headpose.reason: Subtle tilt toward the empty space — neutral overall.

sample8.jpg.note: Stylized blue-gel + magenta-rim lighting, young woman, lavender backdrop. Editorial/fashion lighting setup, not standard portrait. Direct confident gaze, neutral expression.

lighting.reason: Intentional artistic colored gels — striking but heavy color cast moves it away from a flattering classical portrait.

composition.reason: Centered, head fills frame well; clean crop.

background.reason: Clean lavender gradient complements the gel lighting — strong cohesive styling.

eyecontact.reason: Direct intense gaze, confident; neutral expression works for the editorial register.

headpose.reason: Frontal with very slight tilt — neutral.

sample9.jpg.note: Office-style headshot, woman in striped blazer. Soft window/key light from front-left. Glass wall background with reflections and window squares. Direct warm smile.

lighting.reason: Soft even window light, gentle modeling on cheek, natural skin.

composition.reason: Three-quarter framing well-balanced, slight body angle adds dynamism, eyes upper third.

background.reason: Glass wall with mottled reflections and window square pattern — patterned and distracting.

eyecontact.reason: Direct, warm full smile, natural connection — strong engagement.

sample10.jpg.note: Laughing woman in red mock-neck, urban heavy-bokeh background. Soft diffused natural light. Big genuine smile with teeth, eyes squinting from laughter.

lighting.reason: Soft natural diffused light, strong catchlights, even exposure with slight warmth.

composition.reason: Half-length well-balanced, hair flow adds motion, eyes upper third.

background.reason: Heavy urban bokeh, strong separation; slight busyness at edges keeps it from +5.

eyecontact.reason: Genuine laugh, big authentic smile, eyes engaged through the squint — unusually strong connection.

headpose.reason: Frontal, slight right tilt, very natural relaxed.

sample11.jpg.note: Suited man in dark suit + red tie, arms crossed, urban dusk backdrop with bare branches. Low-key moody lighting. Confident slight-smirk expression.

lighting.reason: Low-key dusk lighting, fairly flat with mild shadow on face; eyes are well-lit.

composition.reason: Three-quarter to full-body framing, vertical aspect strong, formal pose composed well.

background.reason: Urban backdrop slightly busy with branches but toned down — doesn't pull focus.

eyecontact.reason: Direct neutral-confident gaze with slight smirk; commanding but not warm.

headpose.reason: Frontal with very slight tilt, formal stance.

sample12.jpg.note: Young man in field with bare teasels, golden-hour backlight. Big joyful smile. NOT looking at camera (eyes up-left). Candid lifestyle shot rather than headshot.

lighting.reason: Beautiful golden-hour rim light, warm tones, well-exposed face despite backlight — exceptional.

composition.reason: Off-center subject with negative space + lead room into where he's looking; natural lifestyle composition.

background.reason: Wild grass + teasels with sunset glow and strong bokeh — natural and beautiful.

eyecontact.reason: Not making eye contact with camera — judged by strict portrait standard, this is a deduction even though the moment is genuine.

headpose.reason: Natural relaxed 3/4 looking up-left, joyful candid.
